issues.issue: Session timeout - abort during health check
issues.action_required: User approval needed for agent restart/recovery

infrastructure_notes.gateway_load: High - parallel spawns caused gateway timeout errors
infrastructure_notes.model_failover: Multiple models attempted due to timeouts (glm-5:cloud -> openrouter/free)

design_issue.issue: Subagents load main IDENTITY.md instead of Norse agent SKILL.md
design_issue.impact: All agents respond as 'Spectre' instead of their Norse names
design_issue.recommendation: Health checks should either: (1) spawn subagents with agent-specific SKILL.md loaded, or (2) verify spawn capability only without identity check
